title: Egyptian-Style Stuffed Tacos with Mulukhiyah
description: Mulukhiyah, a popular Egyptian leafy green, is paired with tacos for a unique twist on traditional tacos. Simply sauté the mulukhiyah with garlic and spices, then stuff it inside tacos with your favorite toppings.
instructions: 1. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the ground beef or turkey and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
3. Add the onion, garlic, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
4. Stir in the chopped mulukhiyah and cook until wilted.
5. Warm the tacos shells according to the package instructions.
6. Spoon the mulukhiyah and beef mixture into the tacos shells.
7. Top with tzatziki sauce, diced tomatoes, shredded lettuce, and any other desired toppings.
